verses.latin_vulgate: Beatus qui intelligit super egenum et pauperem :  in die mala liberabit eum Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֭שְׁרֵי מַשְׂכִּ֣יל אֶל־דָּ֑ל בְּי֥וֹם רָ֝עָ֗ה יְֽמַלְּטֵ֥הוּ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Blessed is he that considereth the poor: the Lord will deliver him in time of trouble.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus conservet eum, et vivificet eum,  et beatum faciat eum in terra,  et non tradat eum in animam inimicorum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֤ה ׀ יִשְׁמְרֵ֣הוּ וִ֭יחַיֵּהוּ (יאשר) [וְאֻשַּׁ֣ר] בָּאָ֑רֶץ וְאַֽל־תִּ֝תְּנֵ֗הוּ בְּנֶ֣פֶשׁ אֹיְבָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: The Lord will preserve him, and keep him alive; and he shall be blessed upon the earth: and thou wilt not deliver him unto the will of his enemies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus opem ferat illi super lectum doloris ejus ;  universum stratum ejus versasti in infirmitate ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְֽהֹוָ֗ה יִ֭סְעָדֶנּוּ עַל־עֶ֣רֶשׂ דְּוָ֑י כׇּל־מִ֝שְׁכָּב֗וֹ הָפַ֥כְתָּ בְחׇלְיֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The Lord will strengthen him upon the bed of languishing: thou wilt make all his bed in his sickness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego dixi : Domine, miserere mei ;  sana animam meam, quia peccavi tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲֽנִי־אָ֭מַרְתִּי יְהֹוָ֣ה חׇנֵּ֑נִי רְפָאָ֥ה נַ֝פְשִׁ֗י כִּי־חָטָ֥אתִי לָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: I said, Lord, be merciful unto me: heal my soul; for I have sinned against thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inimici mei dixerunt mala mihi :  Quando morietur, et peribit nomen ejus ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אוֹיְבַ֗י יֹאמְר֣וּ רַ֣ע לִ֑י מָתַ֥י יָ֝מ֗וּת וְאָבַ֥ד שְׁמֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Mine enemies speak evil of me, When shall he die, and his name perish?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et si ingrediebatur ut videret, vana loquebatur ;  cor ejus congregavit iniquitatem sibi.  Egrediebatur foras et loquebatur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־בָּ֤א לִרְא֨וֹת ׀ שָׁ֤וְא יְדַבֵּ֗ר לִבּ֗וֹ יִקְבׇּץ־אָ֥וֶן ל֑וֹ יֵצֵ֖א לַח֣וּץ יְדַבֵּֽר׃
verses.king_james: And if he come to see me, he speaketh vanity: his heart gathereth iniquity to itself; when he goeth abroad, he telleth it.

verses.latin_vulgate: In idipsum adversum me susurrabant omnes inimici mei ;  adversum me cogitabant mala mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַ֗חַד עָלַ֣י יִ֭תְלַחֲשׁוּ כׇּל־שֹׂנְאָ֑י עָלַ֓י ׀ יַחְשְׁב֖וּ רָעָ֣ה לִֽי׃
verses.king_james: All that hate me whisper together against me: against me do they devise my hurt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verbum iniquum constituerunt adversum me :  Numquid qui dormit non adjiciet ut resurgat ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דְּֽבַר־בְּ֭לִיַּעַל יָצ֣וּק בּ֑וֹ וַאֲשֶׁ֥ר שָׁ֝כַ֗ב לֹא־יוֹסִ֥יף לָקֽוּם׃
verses.king_james: An evil disease, say they, cleaveth fast unto him: and now that he lieth he shall rise up no more.

verses.latin_vulgate: Etenim homo pacis meæ in quo speravi,  qui edebat panes meos,  magnificavit super me supplantationem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־אִ֤ישׁ שְׁלוֹמִ֨י ׀ אֲשֶׁר־בָּטַ֣חְתִּי ב֭וֹ אוֹכֵ֣ל לַחְמִ֑י הִגְדִּ֖יל עָלַ֣י עָקֵֽב׃
verses.king_james: Yea, mine own familiar friend, in whom I trusted, which did eat of my bread, hath lifted up his heel against me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu autem, Domine, miserere mei,  et resuscita me ; et retribuam eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֤ה יְהֹוָ֗ה חׇנֵּ֥נִי וַהֲקִימֵ֑נִי וַאֲשַׁלְּמָ֥ה לָהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: But thou, O Lord, be merciful unto me, and raise me up, that I may requite them.

verses.latin_vulgate: In hoc cognovi quoniam voluisti me,  quoniam non gaudebit inimicus meus super me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּזֹ֣את יָ֭דַעְתִּי כִּֽי־חָפַ֣צְתָּ בִּ֑י כִּ֤י לֹֽא־יָרִ֖יעַ אֹיְבִ֣י עָלָֽי׃
verses.king_james: By this I know that thou favourest me, because mine enemy doth not triumph over me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Me autem propter innocentiam suscepisti ;  et confirmasti me in conspectu tuo in æternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֗י בְּ֭תֻמִּי תָּמַ֣כְתָּ בִּ֑י וַתַּצִּיבֵ֖נִי לְפָנֶ֣יךָ לְעוֹלָֽם׃
verses.king_james: And as for me, thou upholdest me in mine integrity, and settest me before thy face for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictus Dominus Deus Israël  a sæculo et usque in sæculum. Fiat, fiat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּ֘ר֤וּךְ יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ אֱלֹ֘הֵ֤י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל מֵֽ֭הָעוֹלָם וְעַ֥ד הָעוֹלָ֗ם אָ֘מֵ֥ן ׀ וְאָמֵֽן׃
verses.king_james: Blessed be the Lord God of Israel from everlasting, and to everlasting. Amen, and Amen.
